case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Rechecked 1080-1260s currencyservice. Sustained diskio (4.2-4.8B/s) and latency (0.6-0.9s) spikes confirm root cause. Implication: currencyservice disk I/O exhaustion drives latency.

Final RCA confirms currencyservice disk I/O exhaustion (4.2-4.8B/s) as primary driver of latency spikes. Sustained anomalies in diskio metrics validate root cause over secondary latency or memory issues.
